facebook.caption: POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and stumble onto Pacific Boat. 4.7 stars. 170 reviews. And most tourists walk straight past it. Cửa Lấp doesn't get the attention it deserves, but locals clearly know something. This is the kind of spot you find by accident and add to every list you send friends. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
